project.name: Module 16a: Payment Integration (ProGate)
project.description: Create the reusable Pro feature gating infrastructure. lib/pro-gate.ts provides checkProStatus() and ProStatus type. hooks/useProGate.ts provides the React hook consumed by all Pro-gated components (16c, 16d, 16e). components/shared/UpgradePrompt.tsx provides the standardized upsell UI. ExtensionPay handles payment backend (Stripe, 5% fee). ProGate is GPL-3.0 — the gating code is visible to anyone. The moat is trust, reviews, maintenance, and the sync backend — not code secrecy.
project.critical_path_position: Module 16a is a HARD dependency for Modules 16c, 16d, 16e (all Pro-gated). Must execute before any Pro feature module. Independent of Modules 14 and 15a — can run in parallel with either.

holy_pb_shortfalls.note: ProGate is new infrastructure with no Holy PB equivalent. No upstream code to audit.

user_stories.title: lib/pro-gate.ts — ExtensionPay integration, ProStatus, and ProGateError
user_stories.description: Create lib/pro-gate.ts with checkProStatus() that calls ExtensionPay's API to determine subscription state. Returns ProStatus { isPro, expiresAt, trialDaysLeft, canTrial }. Handles: active subscription, expired subscription, trial, no subscription. ExtensionPay SDK loaded once and cached. Includes openPaymentPage() to launch ExtensionPay checkout. ProStatus interface defined in lib/types.ts (centralized domain types convention). ProGateError + ProGateErrorContext added to lib/errors.ts (established error class pattern). lib/ module — zero React imports.
steps: PREREQUISITE: Research ExtensionPay SDK — (a) check npm registry for `extpay` package and current version, (b) read extensionpay.com API docs, (c) confirm API shape: ExtPay(extensionId), extpay.getUser(), extpay.openPaymentPage(), extpay.onPaid.addListener(), (d) determine if TypeScript types exist or if .d.ts declaration file is needed, (e) verify CWS publication requirement for real integration.
RED: Test: 'ProGateError is instanceof Error with name ProGateError and context'
RED: Test: 'ProGateErrorContext has valid code field'
RED: Test: 'checkProStatus returns isPro:true for active subscriber'
RED: Test: 'checkProStatus returns isPro:false for expired subscriber'
RED: Test: 'checkProStatus returns canTrial:true for new user'
RED: Test: 'checkProStatus returns trialDaysLeft for trial user'
RED: Test: 'checkProStatus returns isPro:false when ExtensionPay unreachable (graceful degradation)'
RED: Test: 'openPaymentPage calls ExtensionPay openPaymentPage'
RED: Test: 'pro-gate.ts has zero React imports (lib/ purity)'

GREEN: Add ProStatus interface to lib/types.ts: { isPro: boolean; expiresAt: number | null; trialDaysLeft: number | null; canTrial: boolean }. Add ProGateErrorContext { code: 'SDK_UNAVAILABLE' | 'NETWORK_ERROR' | 'CHECK_FAILED' } and ProGateError class to lib/errors.ts following established pattern (readonly name, context, ErrorOptions). Create lib/pro-gate.ts — import type { ProStatus } from '@/lib/types'. Create ExtensionPay singleton wrapper. Implement checkProStatus() — calls extpay.getUser(), maps response to ProStatus. Implement openPaymentPage(). Handle errors gracefully: if ExtensionPay is unreachable, return isPro: false (never break the free tier). Define PRO_EXTENSION_ID constant (placeholder — configured at build time or first run).
REFACTOR: Ensure zero React imports. Ensure graceful degradation on network failure. Use ProGateError for ExtensionPay failures (network, timeout, SDK unavailable).
acceptance_criteria: ProStatus in lib/types.ts: { isPro: boolean; expiresAt: number | null; trialDaysLeft: number | null; canTrial: boolean }
ProGateErrorContext in lib/errors.ts: { code: 'SDK_UNAVAILABLE' | 'NETWORK_ERROR' | 'CHECK_FAILED' }
ProGateError in lib/errors.ts: follows established error class pattern (readonly name, context, ErrorOptions)
checkProStatus(): calls ExtensionPay getUser(), maps to ProStatus
Active subscription: isPro = true, expiresAt set
Expired: isPro = false, expiresAt in past
Trial: isPro = true, trialDaysLeft > 0
No subscription: isPro = false, canTrial = true (if never trialed)
Network failure: isPro = false (graceful degradation — never break free tier)
openPaymentPage(): launches ExtensionPay checkout
Zero React imports in lib/pro-gate.ts
ExtensionPay SDK initialized once and cached
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/pro-gate.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: useProGate hook and UpgradePrompt component
user_stories.description: Create hooks/useProGate.ts — React hook wrapping checkProStatus() with loading state, caching, and periodic refresh. Create components/shared/UpgradePrompt.tsx — standardized upsell component shown in place of Pro features for free users. Shows feature name, benefit description, and 'Upgrade to Pro' button that calls openPaymentPage().
steps: RED: Test: 'useProGate returns loading:true initially'
RED: Test: 'useProGate returns ProStatus after check completes'
RED: Test: 'useProGate.showUpgrade calls openPaymentPage'
RED: Test: 'useProGate caches result (does not re-fetch on re-render)'
RED: Test: 'useProGate refreshes on document visibilitychange event'
RED: Test: 'UpgradePrompt renders feature name and upgrade button'
RED: Test: 'UpgradePrompt button calls showUpgrade callback'
RED: Test: 'UpgradePrompt shows trial CTA when canTrial is true'

GREEN: Create hooks/useProGate.ts — useState for ProStatus + loading state, useRef boolean flag to prevent duplicate fetches on re-render. useEffect calls checkProStatus(). Provide showUpgrade function that calls openPaymentPage(). Add visibilitychange listener to refresh on tab focus (user pays → returns → sees Pro immediately). Create components/shared/UpgradePrompt.tsx with feature prop, benefit description, and action button. Style with existing shadcn Card + Button.
REFACTOR: Ensure hook is lightweight. Verify visibilitychange listener is cleaned up on unmount.
acceptance_criteria: useProGate returns: { isPro, loading, expiresAt, trialDaysLeft, canTrial, showUpgrade }
Loading state while checkProStatus() runs
Cached result — does not re-fetch on re-render (useRef flag)
showUpgrade() calls openPaymentPage()
Refreshes ProStatus on document visibilitychange event (user pays → returns → sees Pro)
visibilitychange listener cleaned up on unmount
UpgradePrompt: displays feature name, benefit text, 'Upgrade to Pro' button
UpgradePrompt: shows 'Start free trial' when canTrial is true
UpgradePrompt: button onClick calls showUpgrade callback
Both files use existing shadcn components (Card, Button)
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/hooks/useProGate.test.ts tests/unit/components/shared/UpgradePrompt.test.tsx && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Background payment status handler and integration verification
user_stories.description: Add CHECK_PRO_STATUS message type to background protocol. Wire handler that calls checkProStatus() and returns result. Add ProStatus to SessionState so popup/manager have immediate access on mount. Unit tests for handler and session state. UpgradePrompt visual E2E deferred to Module 16c (first Pro feature consumer — no Pro feature area exists until then).
steps: Add CheckProStatusMessage to background-types.ts. Add proStatus: ProStatus to SessionState.
Wire handler in handlers.ts: calls checkProStatus(), returns ProStatus.
Update buildLockedState and handleGetState to include proStatus.
RED: Unit: 'CHECK_PRO_STATUS handler returns ProStatus'
RED: Unit: 'SessionState includes proStatus field'
RED: Unit: 'buildLockedState includes proStatus with default values ({ isPro: false, expiresAt: null, trialDaysLeft: null, canTrial: true })'
GREEN: Implement handler. Update session state construction. Wire unit tests.
Update scaffold-smoke.test.ts to verify SessionState includes proStatus field.
Run full verification: tsc + eslint + vitest + wxt build
acceptance_criteria: CHECK_PRO_STATUS message type added to protocol
SessionState includes proStatus: ProStatus field
Handler calls checkProStatus() and returns result
buildLockedState includes proStatus (default: { isPro: false, expiresAt: null, trialDaysLeft: null, canTrial: true })
Smoke test updated to verify SessionState includes proStatus field
UpgradePrompt visual E2E deferred to Module 16c (first consumer — no Pro feature area exists yet)
Full verification passes
Zero regressions

what_exists.note: Starting state depends on whether Module 14 and 15a have completed. Read actual state from the most recent progress.md before starting.
what_exists.estimated_after_15a: ~920 unit tests, ~200 E2E tests (rough estimate). 16+ lib/ modules. Background protocol at ~20 message types (original 16 + IMPORT_HUSH + 3 SYNC_*).
what_exists.key_files: All lib/ modules, background handlers, popup, manager, settings (all from Modules 1-13). ImportSection, HushImportSection (Module 14). sync-client, sync-types, sync-queue (Module 15a).

what_does_not_exist.pro_gate: No lib/pro-gate.ts. No useProGate hook. No UpgradePrompt component.
what_does_not_exist.pro_status: No ProStatus in SessionState. No CHECK_PRO_STATUS message type.
what_does_not_exist.pro_types: No ProStatus in lib/types.ts. No ProGateError in lib/errors.ts.

tech_stack.extensionpay: ExtensionPay (extensionpay.com) — payment SDK for Chrome extensions. Handles Stripe integration, subscription management, trial periods. SDK is a JS file loaded in extension context. API: ExtPay(id).getUser(), .openPaymentPage(), .onPaid.addListener(). 5% fee on top of Stripe fees.
tech_stack.extensionpay_installation: Research current ExtensionPay installation method before starting. May be npm package (extpay) or manual script include. The SDK handles all Stripe communication — Hush never touches payment details directly.
tech_stack.testing: Mock ExtensionPay SDK in tests. The SDK communicates with extensionpay.com servers — mock the getUser() and openPaymentPage() calls.
forbidden_patterns: Direct Stripe API calls (ExtensionPay handles this)
Breaking free tier on ExtensionPay failure (graceful degradation mandatory)

pro_gate_philosophy.code_is_visible: lib/pro-gate.ts is GPL-3.0. Anyone can read the gating logic. A forker can strip useProGate() checks. This is BY DESIGN.
pro_gate_philosophy.moat_is_not_code: The moat is: cloud sync (proprietary backend), CWS review momentum, Sentry-monitored maintenance, brand trust. Not code secrecy.
pro_gate_philosophy.graceful_degradation: If ExtensionPay is unreachable → treat as free user. Never break the free tier. Never show errors about payment infrastructure to free users.

licensing.pro_gate_license: GPL-3.0 (code visible, feature gated by ExtensionPay license check)

read_first: ExtensionPay documentation (research current API before starting)

inputs.what_it_provides: Result<T,E> type, home for ProStatus interface
Error class pattern, home for ProGateError

outputs.description: Pro status check, payment page launch

known_risks.issue: ExtensionPay API may have changed since last research
known_risks.action: Research current API BEFORE writing any code. Check npm package, docs, installation method.

known_risks.issue: ExtensionPay SDK may not have TypeScript types
known_risks.action: Create .d.ts declaration file for ExtensionPay API.

known_risks.issue: ExtensionPay requires extension to be published on CWS
known_risks.action: During development and testing, mock ExtensionPay entirely. Real integration tested after CWS publication.

known_risks.issue: Race condition: popup checks pro status while payment completes
known_risks.action: useProGate refreshes on visibilitychange event. ExtensionPay onPaid listener provides immediate callback.

dependency_chain.upstream: Module 15a (for background-types.ts state). Can run in parallel with 14 and 15a if background-types changes are coordinated.
dependency_chain.downstream: Module 16c (Tags), 16d (Panic Button), 16e (Dashboard) — ALL consume useProGate() and UpgradePrompt. Module 16c is also responsible for the first UpgradePrompt visual E2E test.
dependency_chain.parallel_safe: Independent of Module 14 and 15a at the lib/ level. Only dependency is background-types.ts message count.

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Research ExtensionPay FIRST — API, installation, types. Commit per story.
metadata.quality_gate: All tests pass. tsc clean. wxt build. Zero React in lib/. Graceful degradation on ExtensionPay failure. Free tier never broken.
metadata.human_review_required: Verify: ExtensionPay SDK integration. ProStatus correctly maps from ExtensionPay response. Graceful degradation tested. UpgradePrompt copy is appropriate.

execution_rules.clarifying_questions: Encouraged. Key: ExtensionPay current API, SDK installation method, type declaration approach, CWS requirement for real testing.
execution_rules.prd_scope: Module 16a of 22. Creates ProGate infrastructure consumed by all Pro feature modules.
